prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that enforce the API deprecation policy: the deprecated API version warning injection, the removal version validation, and the minimum supported API version checks in the API server.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that enforce the API deprecation policy: the deprecated API version warning injection, the removal version validation, and the minimum supported API version checks in the API server.
